v9b_advisory.operating_point_description: Default mode. Catches 97 of 100 tumors with about 9 false alarms per 100 healthy scans.
v9b_advisory.rule: At least 2 of 4 detectors must agree on the same region (Pattern + Asymmetry, Outline Drawer + Reconstruction, Asymmetry + Reconstruction, or Pattern + Outline Drawer).
v9b_advisory.rule_technical: (Pattern AND Asymmetry) OR (Outline AND Reconstruction) OR (Asymmetry AND Reconstruction) OR (Pattern AND Outline)
v9b_advisory.signals_used: All 4 detectors active: Pattern, Reconstruction, Outline Drawer, Asymmetry

detector_summary.name: Pattern Detector
detector_summary.description: Compares each region to what healthy brains look like

detector_summary.name: Reconstruction Detector
detector_summary.description: Tries to redraw the scan and highlights where it struggles

detector_summary.name: Tumor Outline Drawer
detector_summary.description: A medical segmentation model trained to outline tumor regions

detector_summary.name: Asymmetry Detector
detector_summary.description: Compares the left and right sides of the brain

segmentation.rule: At least 2 of 4 detectors must agree on the same region (Pattern + Asymmetry, Outline Drawer + Reconstruction, Asymmetry + Reconstruction, or Pattern + Outline Drawer).
segmentation.signals_used: All 4 detectors active: Pattern, Reconstruction, Outline Drawer, Asymmetry
